jsonld.name: Attentional Coalescence
jsonld.description: A state where scattered or fragmentary elements of a problem, question, or domain suddenly organize themselves into a coherent pattern. This is not logical deduction but rather a phenomenological reorganization where previously separate considerations suddenly appear as aspects of a single structure.
